reviews.author: Gary Giddens
reviews.text: I have delt with several concrete contractors, and Maurice is best. He is honest and straight forward. No BS here. Many years of experience and it shows. I would recommend him to my family or anyone. Don't waste time if you want the job done right, you should call Maurice.

reviews.author: Wanda Garland
reviews.text: Maurice did a wonderful job on my screened in porch, patio and pergola. I could not imagine that anyone could have done a better job! He was very considerate of my yard and did an excellent job! I would highly recommend him!!!

reviews.author: Josh Hughes
reviews.text: Very satisfied with this company. I reached out and he showed up as planned and had our concrete poured within a few days. Excellent work and will be calling them back for our next projects.

reviews.author: Rory Foster
reviews.text: Maurice and his crew were true professionals. Outstanding communication about every aspect of the project. Will highly recommend for your masonry needs.

reviews.author: Terrie Flaherty
reviews.text: Exceptional customer service, arrived at prescheduled time. The quality of his work was outstanding and very reasonably priced. Would definitely hire him again.

reviews.author: Jolleen Cason
reviews.text: Maurice's company did a wonderful job on our back porch. They were professional, courteous and knowledgeable. I wish I had heard of him earlier so he wouldn't have had to come fix another local concrete company's mistake.

reviews.author: Matt Barker
reviews.text: Highly recommend using their services. Very easy to communicate with and very knowledgable. Got the work done when they said and did it well. Was a pleasure to work with. Found my concrete contractor.

reviews.author: Amanda Bowers
reviews.text: I hired this company to demolish and remove an old pizza oven on the back porch of my condo. It was a difficult job and they did it in one morning with one day's notice. The communication was frequent and perfect, the job site is clean, and the price was very reasonable.

notes: Owner Maurice. Owner-operated concrete contractor, Hawthorne FL (16332 NE 70th Pl). 21+ years. Driveways, patios, porches, masonry. 8 verbatim reviews extracted from existing HTML review-feed. Site is non-Atlanta (Florida) — confirm outbound list scope.

capture_attempts.reason: 8 verbatim reviews with named reviewers from HTML inline
